views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main dashboard showing today's caffeine level with animated progress ring toward 400mg FDA limit, live caffeine-in-system decay estimate, cup count, most recent drink, and a quick-add FAB for fast logging

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick entry modal with drink type grid selector, size picker, auto-calculated caffeine estimate based on drink+size+shots, adjustable via stepper, optional cost and notes

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Date-grouped entry list showing each drink with type icon, caffeine amount, time, and daily totals. Filter by drink type. Calendar heatmap colored by caffeine intensity

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Weekly/monthly caffeine trend charts, average daily intake, peak consumption hour distribution, drink type breakdown pie chart, cost analysis, week-over-week comparison, and smart insights about intake patterns

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCups
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total number of drinks logged today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCaffeineMg
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all caffeine mg consumed today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of daily caffeine goal consumed (todayCaffeineMg / dailyGoalMg), clamped 0-1

viewModelComputedProperties.name: caffeineInSystem
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Estimated caffeine still active in body using 5-hour half-life decay formula: sum of each entry's mg * pow(0.5, hoursElapsed/5.0)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: lastDrinkTime
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Timestamp of the most recent drink today, nil if no drinks yet

viewModelComputedProperties.name: safeToCutoffTime
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Latest recommended caffeine intake time today (8 hours before typical bedtime of 11pm = 3pm cutoff)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days where caffeine intake stayed at or below the daily goal (400mg default)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily caffeine mg over the past 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change comparing this week's average to last week's average

viewModelComputedProperties.name: peakHour
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Hour of day (0-23) with highest average caffeine consumption across all entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: drinkTypeBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of drink types and their total caffeine mg, sorted descending, for pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 7 days with date and total caffeine mg per day for bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 30 days with date and total caffeine mg per day for line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalSpent
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of cost field for current month's entries

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Dynamically generated insight strings based on patterns: late-night caffeine warnings, streak celebrations, weekend vs weekday comparison, trend alerts

dailyGoal.description: FDA-recommended maximum daily caffeine intake. User-adjustable. Progress ring shows consumption toward this limit with color changes: green (<50%), yellow (50-80%), orange (80-100%), red (>100%)

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as successful if total caffeine intake is at or below the daily goal (default 400mg). Days with zero entries are excluded (not counted as success or failure). Streak breaks only when a logged day exceeds the goal.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare current 7-day rolling average vs previous 7-day rolling average. Show percentage change with up/down arrows. Also track: average cups per day trend, most consumed drink type shift, peak hour consistency, and spending trend.
domainLogic.halfLifeFormula: caffeineRemaining = originalMg * pow(0.5, hoursElapsed / 5.0). Caffeine half-life is approximately 5 hours for average adults. Sum across all today's entries to get current estimated caffeine in system.
insights: Late caffeine warning: flags entries after 3pm with message about potential sleep impact
Streak milestone: celebrates 7, 14, 30 day streaks of staying under goal
Weekend vs weekday: compares average intake on weekdays vs weekends
Intake trending up/down: alerts when weekly average shifts more than 15% from baseline
Top drink insight: identifies most-consumed drink type this week
Cost insight: monthly spend estimate based on current pace
Hydration reminder: suggests water intake based on caffeine consumption (1:1 water-to-coffee ratio)
Peak hour pattern: identifies consistent consumption windows and changes
